gauges.name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
gauges.sub: Below 50 = contraction. Now expanding a 5th straight month — highest since 2022.

lens3.title: Price-Trend Technical
lens3.sub: A trend-confirmation gauge — the signal that historically tells you a bear is actually underway, not just feared.

gauges.name: 50-day vs 150-day SMA
gauges.sub: Bear trigger: 50-day crosses below 150-day AND both flatten or slope down. The signal that historically tells you a bear is actually underway, not just feared.
gauges.detail: S&P ≈ 7,544. 50-day above 150-day (200-day ≈ 6,974); both slopes up. No death cross.

summary.headline: Peak-like positioning, but no recession and no trend break. The classic "late-cycle, not end-of-cycle" setup.
summary.badge: Economy calm · Market frothy · Uptrend intact — stay invested, stay disciplined
